title: Contains Duplicate
problem_statement: Given an integer array nums, return true if any value appears at least twice in the array, and false if every element is distinct.

examples.explanation: The value 1 appears more than once.

intuition: Use a set to remember values already seen. If a value is added twice, it is a duplicate.

approaches.name: HashSet Lookup
approaches.description: Add each number to a set while scanning. If a number already exists, return true.

interview_qa.q: Why is HashSet a good choice here?
interview_qa.a: HashSet membership checks are average O(1), so duplicates are detected quickly.

interview_qa.q: What if the array must not use extra space?
interview_qa.a: Sort the array and then check adjacent values. This uses O(1) extra space but O(n log n) time.
